creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael V from comment #0)

7f0d57bd050b commit disables some options that are supported by ffmeg.

Could you try a fresh ~/.config/cmus by moving old one to a new name as a backup?

Also, you need to turn off PRISM on cmus configuration:
# MPRIS (BASU) error:  https://github.com/cmus/cmus/issues/1124
#                      https://github.com/cmus/cmus/issues/609
